advice.title: You broke the build often
advice.body: You broke the build on 1/6 checkpoints (16%). Frequent breakage masks the source of new failures and forces you to debug stale code alongside new code.

advice.title: Refactorings introduced new smells
advice.body: 2 refactorings you applied introduced new smells. Refactoring should leave things cleaner than it found them — check whether you extracted a method that's now too long, or moved code without splitting it.

advice.title: Process score fell over the session
